PHASE-65-PREMIUM-RC-NOTES.scope: Premium release-candidate notes for the Matrix frontend, responsive adaptation, compactness/deletion audit, visible logo integration, and premium Resend email templates.

premium-scope.item-1: premium Matrix frontend: public/auth screens, protected user cabinet, and admin cockpit use the shared Matrix visual system with reduced-motion and pointer-safe canvas boundaries.
premium-scope.item-2: responsive adaptation: phone, tablet, desktop, no-horizontal-scroll, no-overlap, safe-area, touch-target, and bounded inventory gates are covered by local static proof.
premium-scope.item-3: compactness/deletion: secondary copy and bulky details were folded while primary VPN, subscription, MTProto, auth, admin, and emergency workflows remain reachable.
premium-scope.item-4: visible logo integration: prepared KrotPN logo assets are present in public/auth/user/admin surfaces without claiming mailbox sender-avatar control.
premium-scope.item-5: premium Resend email templates: verification and password-reset emails use the premium Matrix-safe shell, public email-logo body image, image-blocking-safe fallback panel, and clean text fallback.

local-evidence.command-3: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=redacted-test-key PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_email_delivery.py -v
local-evidence.command-15: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected source/deploy/runtime guard

screenshot-static-evidence.public-auth: Public landing, login, register, forgot-password, reset-password, and verify-email surfaces are covered by Phase-56 and Phase-60 route/viewport static proof.
screenshot-static-evidence.user-cabinet: Protected dashboard, config, subscription, referrals, and settings surfaces are covered by Phase-57 and Phase-60 route/static proof; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
screenshot-static-evidence.admin-cockpit: Admin dashboard, users, devices, MTProto, servers, plans, and analytics surfaces are covered by Phase-58 and Phase-60 route/static proof; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
screenshot-static-evidence.email-template: Premium verification and reset email HTML/text rendering is covered by backend tests and Phase-64 render smoke; delivered mailbox rendering remains clean-deploy follow-up.
screenshot-static-evidence.reduced-motion: Reduced-motion policy is covered by Phase-55, Phase-59, Phase-60, and Phase-61 static markers.

live-validation-gaps.gap-1: Authenticated protected-route browser screenshots against a real backend session.
live-validation-gaps.gap-2: delivered Resend email rendering with remote images enabled and disabled.
live-validation-gaps.gap-3: Real phone/tablet browser review after deployment from GitHub main.
live-validation-gaps.gap-4: Operator decision on prerelease versus stable promotion after live validation.

release-notes.note-1: The premium frontend train is locally release-candidate ready for operator validation.
release-notes.note-2: Local evidence is deterministic and redacted; live evidence remains explicitly separated.
release-notes.note-3: No release tag, GitHub push, deploy, or stable promotion was performed by Phase-65.

PHASE-65-PREMIUM-RC-NOTES.release-decision-boundary: No release tag, GitHub push, deploy, or stable promotion was performed by Phase-65. A separate explicit operator release request is required.
PHASE-65-PREMIUM-RC-NOTES.redaction-boundary: Evidence must not include Telegram proxy links, VPN configs, auth tokens, provider keys, database URLs, private keys, real recipient emails, raw IP exports, or release credentials.
